speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain
text: Mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain. Aaj meeting mein Boss ne sabke samne meri aukat dikha di. Gaon mein Monsoon ki wajah se fasal barbaad ho gayi aur Sahukaar ka karz sar par hai. Mera sharir bilkul toot raha hai aur thakan khatam hi nahi ho rahi. Mujhe bas ye sir dard thik karna hai taaki main UPSC ki taiyari dobara shuru kar sakun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the exact body phrase back to validate the Somatization.
text: Tumhare bojh ka asar aisa hai ki sach mein 'mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain', aur tum bas jaldi se theek hona chahte ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain
text: Haan, itne saalon ki mehnat lagayi hai dilli aakar. UPSC clear nahi hua toh kya hoga? Sahukaar ka karz papa ko khaa jayega. Isliye main ye part-time job kar raha hoon par aaj boss ne beizzati kar di. Mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain, bas dawai kha raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty and role expectation driving his exhaustion.
text: Pita ji ko karz se bachane aur UPSC nikalne ki dohari zimmedari ne tumhe is part-time job ki beizzati sehne par majboor kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahukaar roj ghar ke chakkar kaat raha hai. Papa kabhi batate nahi, par mummy roti hai phone par. Aise mein jab main padhne baithta hoon toh sharir saath chhod deta hai. Log kya kahenge agar lalla khali haath gaon wapas aa gaya... sharam aati hai soch kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the stigma cue softly with a shorter restatement ending in a pause.
text: Biradari ke taanon aur khali haath lautne ka darr tumhe bohot daba raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain
text: Bohot jyada dabaav hai. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai sab chhod-chhad ke bhag jaun, par jaunga kahan? Mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain, bas aisa lagta hai koi dawai dede jisse thoda araam mile aur main dubara padh saku.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the long duration of carrying this immense pressure.
text: Pata nahi kitne saalon se tum is taiyari, parivaar ki ummeedon aur lagatar physical pain ko bina ruke bardasht karte aa rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Teen saal ho gaye. Monsoon har saal dhokha deta hai aur mera result bhi har saal yahi karta hai. Sahukaar ka interest badhta ja raha hai aur meri age bhi. Raat bhar neend nahi aati.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question to bring the core conflict into view.
text: Is poori akelepan ki thakan aur failure ke darr ke beech, tumhe apne andar sabse zyada kya chubhta hai jab UPSC ki kitaab saamne hoti hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Yahi chubhta hai ki main apne maa-baap ka gunahgaar hoon. Fasal barbaad ho gayi aur main unki madad karne ke bajaye yahan baithkar unka bacha-kucha paisa laga raha hoon. Boss ne bhi wahi kaha aaj ki main kisi kaam ka nahi. Mujhe khud se ghinn aa rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the unexpressed shame tied to his perceived failure as a son.
text: Lagta hai boss ki baaton aur fasal ke nuksan ke beech, tumhare andar apne parivaar ki ummeedon par khara na utar pane ki ek ajeeb si SHAME baith gayi hai jise tum chupa rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi pakda aapne. Bohot sharam aati hai. Gaon mein sabko lagta tha main bada saheb banunga. Aur yahan meri aukaat part-time job mein do kaudi ki ho gayi hai. Ye sharir ka tootna bhi shayad isiliye hai kyunki main andar se haar chuka hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize his shame structurally while separating his worth from the exam and job outcomes.
text: Hindi belt se aaye UPSC aspirants ke liye itna lamba sangharsh aur parivaar ke aarthik bojh ke chalte sharminda mehsoos karna bilkul normal hai; par yaad rakhna ki ek kharab fasal ya ek boss ka ghatiya ravaiya tumhari itne saalon ki mehnat ki keemat tay nahi kar sakti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap keh toh rahe hain, par sach yahi hai ki panchayat aur rishtedar sirf results dekhte hain. Agar unhe pata chala ki main boss ki gaaliyan kha kar survival ke liye job kar raha hoon, toh humari izzat mitti mein mil jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to the stigma cue softly focusing on the fear of community judgment.
text: Gaon walo ki is soch ne tumhe apni sachai ko chupa kar akele hi sab kuch sehne par majboor kar diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Akele hi sehna padega kuki wahi mera farz hai. Par ye sir dard aur fail hone ka darr ab saha nahi ja raha. Aap hi batao, ab kya karoon? Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka raasta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, actionable steps that can be done immediately without adding burden.
text: Is dimaagi aur sharirik thakan ke beech 2 chote kadam utha sakte hain: ya toh aaj raat kitaab band karke sirf 10 minute theek se araam karne par dhyan do, ya phir apne part-time job aur padhai ka ek rough time-block paper par likh lo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kitabein toh abhi dekhne ki himmat nahi hai bilkul. Paper par time-block likhna shayad thik rahe, kyunki dimaag mein bohot bheed ho gayi hai ki kab padhun aur kab job karun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk him through making the time-block step by step.
text: Pehle ek blank paper aur pen uthao... phir usme apne din ke sirf woh ghante mark karo jo strictly job wale hain... bas itna hi aaj ke liye likhna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Rukiye... haan, likh liya. Job ke 6 ghante hote hain, aur baaki 4 ghante taiyari ke nikalne padte hain. Par jab job mein itna apmaan hota hai toh thakan ki vajah se padhai nahi hoti theek se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the physical symptoms as a systemic response to his economic and social stress.
text: Aksar job ka stress aur sahukaar ka dabaav hamare dimaag ke sath-sath sharir ko bhi high-alert mode mein daal deta hai, isliye lagatar sir dard aur aisi thakan mehsus hona ek normal physical response hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Achha, toh ye sir dard meri sharam aur karz ke stress ki wajah se ho raha hai? Main toh MRI karane ki soch raha tha par paise nahi the. Sahukaar ke baare me sochta hu toh gardan aur sir akad jate hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate how his body is communicating his financial stress.
text: Tumhare sharir ki aithan tumhe bata rahi hai ki sahukaar ka bojh seedha tumhare physical pain mein badal raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Ek toh fasal ka nuksan, upar se agla interest payment agle mahine dena hai. Mujhe us part-time job me boss ki gaaliyan sunkar hi paise jutane honge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Help him find a small pocket of relief within his demanding schedule.
text: Is aarthik zaroorat ke chalte, kya hum tumhare time-block mein koi ek chhota sa hissa nikal sakte hain jahan tum khud ko is apmaan aur dabaav se thoda door rakh sako?

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad travel karte waqt metro mein... wahan main bas gaane sun sakta hoon ya apne current affairs podcast bina kisi tension ke thodi der shanti se sun sakta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his choice of using the commute as a practical way to decompress.
text: Metro ke us safar mein apne liye thoda shant samay nikalna tumhari practical approach dikhata hai; yeh chhote pal tumhari UPSC ki lagan ko bina sharir tode aage badhne mein madad karenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Metro ka lamba safar wase bhi dhyan batane ke liye thik rehta hai. Par us time shayad main apne papa ke us thake hue chehre ko bhool nahi pata jab woh khet mein sookhi fasal ke samne khade hote hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how his father's struggle drives him forward despite the pain.
text: Pita ji ka woh utra hua chehra baar baar samne aana tumhe rukne ya haar manne nahi deta, bhale hi andar se lag raha ho ki aage nahi badh sakte.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi ek wajah hai jo mujhe har roz utha kar dobara us table par bitha deti hai. Par main waqai theek hona chahta hoon, ye sir dard lekar main unhe karz se mukt nahi kar paunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe taking care of his body as an essential part of fulfilling his duty.
text: Sharir ko 'machine' samajhne ke bajaye, usko apne sangharsh ka sabse bada sathi manna hoga; jab dimaag par izzat aur karz ka bojh thoda samajh mein aane lagega, toh yeh physical pain apne aap halka hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye sach hai. Main apni body ko bahut neglect kar raha hoon. Padhai aur kaam ke alawa na theek se khata hoon aur na hi chain se sota hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how he has abandoned his own needs for the sake of his duties.
text: Apni zimmedariyon ko poora karne ki is lagatar daud mein tumne apni khud ki zaruraton ko bilkul pichhe chhod diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Aaj time block banaya toh dekha ki khane ka toh koi fixed time hi nahi hai mera. Usko theek karna padega varna hospital jana padega jo hum bilkul afford nahi kar sakte.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompt him to set a manageable goal for himself regarding his meals.
text: Khane ka ek fixed time banana sach mein ek bohot zaroori kadam hai; kal se kis ek waqt ke khane ko tum apna fixed aur shanti wala time banaoge?

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat ka khana. Padhai ke baad kam se kam 15 minute bina kisi kitaab ya job ki tension ke bas shanti se khana khaunga roz.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his commitment to carving out a small piece of peace for himself.
text: Raat ke khane ko apna shanti ka waqt banana, tumhari taiyari aur apne parivaar ke aane wale dino ke liye ek bahut samajhdari wala kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sukriya. Aapse baat karke ab dimaag kafi shant hai aur sach kahun toh sir dard bhi pehle se thoda behtar lag raha hai. Aaj kam se kam thodi der main chain se so paunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close by reflecting the hard-earned relief and rest he has achieved.
text: Aaj is lambi baatcheet aur apne bojh ko samajhne ke baad, aakhirkar tum us raahat bhari neend ke puri tarah se haqdaar ban gaye ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan
text: Team meeting mein zillat milne ke baad se meri chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan mehsus ho raha hai ki saans lena mushkil hai. Papa ne kisan hokar apni life savings meri coaching mein laga di thi par ab crop failure se sab debt spiral mein phasi hai, isi wajah se shaayad mujhe raat bhar neend nahi aati. Ye chest tightness thik nahi ho rahi aur lag raha hai ki mera dum ghut jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the exact body phrase to validate the somatic experience before addressing the underlying stressor.
text: Aapki chhati mein yeh jo jakdan aur bhari-pan lagatar mehsus ho raha hai jisse saans lene mein takleef ho rahi hai, yeh us meeting ki incident ke baad se bohot zyada haavi ho gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, boss ne sabke samne meri performance par sawal uthaya. Par mera dhyan lag hi nahi raha hai aaj kal. Ek taraf office ka target aur doosri taraf gaon se papa ka phone, dono ke beech phas gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the prolonged duration of this dual pressure causing the distress.
text: Pichle kuch dino se lagatar chal raha yeh corporate target ka dabaav aur ghar ki chinta, aapko ek minute ke liye bhi shanti se focus nahi karne de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shanti toh door ki baat hai, pura weekend laptop pe nikal jata hai. Jabse unki crop failure ki news aayi hai, mujhe bas yahi tension rehti hai ki wo us massive debt spiral ko akele kaise jhel rahe honge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open-ended question to explore the somatic response to this specific familial pressure.
text: Jab aapko yeh khayal aata hai ki gaon mein papa us debt ko akele jhel rahe hain, us waqt aapki body andar se kaisa react karti hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan
text: Wahi seene ki problem badh jati hai. Phir se chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan hone lagta hai jaise andar kuch break ho jayega. Unhone apna sab kuch meri coaching pe laga diya tha aur main abhi unhe bacha nahi pa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the deep relational obligation and the weight of being the sole support.
text: Ek akele sahare ki tarah is poore parivaar ko bachane ki zimmedari aur papa ki mehnat ko justify karne ka bojh aapko literally physically daba raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dab toh gaya hoon main. Sometimes lagta hai ki itni mehnat karke yahan IT mein aaya hi kyun agar papa ki life savings ka kuch return nahi de paya. Main poori tarah se trapped feel kar raha hoon is loop mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the deep exhaustion that comes from the C5 stressor combined with duty-based somatization.
text: Lagta hai is IT job ko bachane aur gaon ke karz ko chukane ki is continuous race mein aap andar se poori tarah thak chuke hain, aur isi exhaustion ne aapko ghutan mein daal diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exhausted hi toh hoon main. Andar se I am literally burnt out. Par main office se break nahi le sakta, agar main leave apply karunga toh team mein log weak samjhenge aur HR appraisal mein marks kat lega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the implied fear of being judged as weak at work, holding a soft pause as per stigma protocol.
text: Chhutti lene par corporate office wale kamzor samjhenge aur iska seedha asar aapke career par padega, shayad yeh darr aapko rok raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, darr hi hai. Main kisi ko office me casually bata bhi nahi sakta apne gaon ke bare me. Ek proper corporate image maintain karni padti hai, warna people start looking down upon you.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate that feeling overwhelmed by financial distress while hiding it at work is completely normal and doesn't define his worth.
text: Bina kisi support ke akele yeh crop failure ka debt aur office ki sharp politics handle karna waqai lamba aur pareshan karne wala ho sakta hai, lekin yeh helpless feel karna bilkul normal hai aur aapki value us corporate image se decide nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan
text: Thank you for understanding that. Mujhe sach mein lagne laga tha ki main hi akele struggle kar raha hoon. Lekin ye chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan ke baare mein soch kar darr lagta hai ki ye theek kaise hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote about how people from rural backgrounds working in corporate often face this intense physical stress silently.
text: Corporate spaces mein apne background ka bojh chhupa kar akele fight karte hue aisi chest tightness ka hona bahut common hai — sirf aapke sath nahi hai, lekin koi openly bolega nahi kyunki yahan problems dikhane ko unprofessional mana jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: That makes so much sense. I guess main akela nahi hoon jo is burden se physical toll le raha hai. But mujhe theek hona hai, aise dar dar ke kaam nahi ho payega. Batao kya karoon abhi, kuch rasta hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer two practical, low-effort steps to help him manage the physical distress immediately.
text: Is achanak aayi ghutan ko thoda kam karne ke liye hum do practical cheezein try kar sakte hain. Pehla, abhi 5 minute screen se door hat kar sirf apni saans par dhyan dena, ya dusra, papa se is baare mein baat karne ke liye ek chota sa note paper par likhna. Aaj abhi ke liye aapko kya manageable lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Note likhna zyada better rahega mere liye. Dimaag mein sab kuch bohot jumbled up hai. Agar main unse baat karne ke points paper par nikal lu, toh maybe thodi clarity aayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk the seeker step by step through the chosen suggestion.
text: Toh phir apne paas ek paper aur pen rakh lijiye... us par ek choti si heading daliye 'Papa se aage ke steps'... bas itna hi kijiye aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Heading daal li hai maine paper pe. Actually, ye process shuru karne ka soch kar hi lag raha hai chest tightness thodi loose ho rahi hai. It's really crazy how mind and body are connected.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the connection between trying to solve systemic issues alone and experiencing somatic pain.
text: Jab humara dimaag lagaatar kisi badi aarthik samasya ko bina bole akele solve karne ki koshish karta hai, toh woh darr hamari body mein isi tarah physical tightness ban kar jama ho jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Makes total sense. Main bas yahan office mein overcompensate kar raha tha aur andar hi andar jal raha tha. Ab I should accept ki halaat tough hain aur papa ke sath baat karke hi kuch niklega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the shift from hiding behind a corporate mask to openly confronting reality with his family.
text: Office ki us satisfaction race aur dikhawe se bahar aakar, ab aap apni asli sthiti ko family ke sath milkar handle karne ka irada bana rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main ek robot ki tarah nahi chal sakta na lagatar. Papa bhi samjhenge. Wo life-long kisaan rahe hain, unhone bhi life me failure dekha hai aur face kiya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how viewing his father's resilience shifts his own burden.
text: Apne papa ki purani mushkilon aur life struggles ko yaad karne ke baad, unse is debt ke baare mein sach bolne ka darr ab kaisa lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab darr kaafi kam lag raha hai honestly. I think wo gussa nahi honge mere office issue se, balki problem ka solution hi dhoondhenge mere saath mil kar. Pata nahi main kyun isko akela utha raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how the long-standing habit of isolating himself is finally breaking.
text: Pichle itne saalon ki aadat ban chuki thi khud ko ek lone warrior samajhne ki, isliye ab jaakar aapko ehsaas hua ki parivaar ke log milkar bhi is bojh ko utha sakte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Coaching se job tak main hamesha akele hi compete karta raha. I really need to drop this lone-wolf act now. Kal weekend hai, main aaram se points ready karke unhe call karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm the maturity and relief in choosing shared family support over isolation.
text: Apne aap ko us akele ladne wale mode se bahar nikal kar, parivaar ke sath openly apni samasya share karne ka faisla karna, ek bohot hi mature aur practical kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thanks. Pehli baar is hateft me thoda mind light mehsus ho raha hai. Crop failure aur debt ka stress ek din mein khatam toh nahi hoga, par kam se kam mujhe ye chupa kar jhoot ki life nahi jeeni padegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect how confronting reality removes the fear of being exposed or failing the image.
text: Sab kuch perfect dikhane aur image tootne ke darr se azad hokar, ab aap bina kisi dikhawe ke real halaat ka samna karne ke liye poori tarah tayaar hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main ready hoon. Corporate job ki zillat temporary hoti hai, par apni family aur health sabse important hai. Meri chest tightness ab almost chali gayi hai aur saans ka pattern bhi normal lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how noticing this physical relief empowers him.
text: Apni breath ko is tarah se normal and relaxed hota hua notice karke, aapke andar aage badhne ka confidence kis tarah badal gaya hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kafi elevated lag raha hai abhi. Jaise ab agar Monday ko meeting mein boss kuch bolega bhi toh main logically handle kar lunga, personal failure ki tarah nahi lunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how his professional role is no longer tied to his entire sense of self.
text: Ek employee ke taur par aapne khud ko clear kar liya hai ki office ki zillat ya target ko apne poore wajood par haavi nahi hone dena hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Absolutely. I am way more than just an IT resource. Aur unka crop failure bhi koi end of the world nahi hai. Hum reconstruct kar lenge dheere dheere sab milkar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reinforce that agricultural and financial distress are systemic issues, not individual moral failures.
text: Kai baar system aur badalte mausam ki wajah se aisi pareshani aati hai jismein parivaar ki koi galti nahi hoti, aur aise halaat family ke sath milkar hi theek hote hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ekdum sahi kaha aapne. It was really good talking to you. Apna burden share karke sach mein lag raha hai ki main theek se saans le pa raha hoon ab. Shukriya time dene ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Praise his courage in facing the distress and reclaiming his physical and emotional space.
text: Zindagi ki itni badi uljhano aur us ghutan ke baare mein yahan khulkar baat karna asaan nahi hota, par aaj akelepan se nikal kar jo kadam aapne uthaya hai uspe aapko khud par garv hona chahiye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan
text: Boss ki screaming ke baad se mere pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan ho rahi hai jo ja hi nahi rahi. PSC dropper hone ka stigma pehle se tha aur ab gaon mein khet sookhne se Papa par sahukaar ka dabav hai, isliye shaayad mera sharir har waqt kaanpta rehta hai. Is thakan aur sharir dard ka koi ilaj batao kyunki main ab aur kamzori bardasht nahi kar sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the exact physical complaint to validate his somatization (Lens A).
text: Tumhari baaton se saaf lag raha hai ki boss ki us daant ke baad se hi yeh pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan rukne ka naam nahi le rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yeh dard jaata hi nahi. Ek toh pehle hi PSC clear nahi hua, itne saalon ki mehnat bekar gayi. Ab ye private job mein roz nikal diye jane ka darr laga rehta hai. Ghar pe bata nahi sakta kyunki wahan alag tension hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the feared consequence of losing his current income stream (Lens E).
text: Aisa mehsoos hota hai ki agar yeh job bhi hath se nikal gayi, toh sahukaar ke karz aur ghar ki ummeedon ke beech tumhara poora parivar bikhar jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Gaon mein waise hi izzat bachana mushkil ho gaya hai. Papa par sahukaar ka pressure itna hai ki mera sharir har waqt kaanpta rehta hai ye soch kar ki agar main rent aur kist nahi bhej paya toh kya hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the prolonged duration of this financial stress taking a physical toll (Lens D).
text: Jabse khet sookhne aur karz ka bojh badha hai, tabse lagatar tumhara sharir is dar ko din-raat jhelte hue bahut buri tarah se thakne laga hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thak chuka hoon sach mein. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai sab chhod-chhad ke kahin bhaag jaun. PSC dropper hone ka tag mujhe jeene nahi de raha, biradari mein kisi se baat nahi kar sakta kyunki sab failure mante hain aur mazaak udate hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responded to the stigma cue by using a short relational restatement and a soft pause (Lens C).
text: Logo ke is nazaariye aur taano ne tumhe apne hi gaon aur biradari mein bilkul akela kar diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan
text: Akela toh hoon hi. Gaon ki panchayat aur rishtedaar sirf sarkari naukri ka result dekhte hain. Aur is sab failure ke stress ki wajah se pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan lagatar bani hui hai. Kuch khaya bhi nahi jata.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used a gentle question to explore how he functions despite the intense physical and emotional toll.
text: Is akelepan aur lagatar fail hone ke darr ke beech, jab sharir is tarah se dard aur panic ke signal de raha hai, toh tum har roz khud ko kaam par jane ke liye kaise sambhalte ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sharir dard
text: Sambhal kahan pa raha hoon? Bas dard ki goli kha leta hoon. PSC ki barbaadi aur sahukaar ka darr, dono mere dimaag mein chalte rehte hain. Ab lagta hai main physical sharir dard ke neeche dab kar poori tarah toot chuka hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the deep exhaustion and helplessness underlying his physical pain.
text: Lagta hai ki apno ki izzat bachane aur sahukaar ka bojh akele uthate-uthate, tumhare andar ek bahut gehri thakan aur bebasi aa chuki hai, jise tumhara sharir panic ke roop mein bahar nikal raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bebasi hi toh hai. Khet ka sookhna mere haath mein thodi tha? Par karz utarna ek bete ki zimmedari hai. Par dard itna zyada hai ki ab office mein boss ki aawaz sunte hi darr ke maare paseene chhutne lagte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalized his physical symptoms as a natural reaction to immense pressure, separating it from his self-worth.
text: Ghar par sahukaar ka bhari dabav aur fir PSC ka toota sapna... aise mahaul mein jab dimag itna bojhal ho, toh sharir ka tanaav se thak jana aur ghabrana bilkul svabhavik hai, aur yeh tumhari kabiliyat ko kam nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baat sunkar thoda halka laga. Mujhe lagta tha main hi mentally kamzor hoon jo har chhoti baat par sharir itna react karta hai. Gaon mein sab mujhe mazboot beta samajhte hain par sach ye hai ki main andar se hil gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Shared a systemic anecdote about young migrant men facing debt to reduce his sense of isolation.
text: Apne ghar walo se door rehne wale bacho mein, khaas kar jab sir par karz ka bojh ho, sharir ka dard aur thakan se tootna ek aam baat hai—sirf tumhare saath nahi, lekin koi mard bolega nahi kyunki samaj taane marta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan
text: Ha yaar, bilkul yahi hota hai. Mard banne ke chakkar mein saari pareshani is pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan bankar reh gayi hai. Main ab poori tarah theek hona chahta hoon, ye sharir dard kam kaise karu, koi rasta batao.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided a systemic reframe linking debt-induced chronic stress directly to his somatic symptoms.
text: Jab dimag par gaon ke karz aur job ki insecure feeling ka lagatar load hota hai, toh hamara nervous system ek danger mode mein chala jata hai, jisse pet mein jalan aur dard shuru hota hai—yeh nervous system ki pukaar hai, tumhari kamzori nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Toh yeh sab mere dimag ke bojh ka physical asar hai? Main toh koi test karane ki soch raha tha. Agar yeh stress ka danger mode hai, toh main job ke waqt is panic se bahar kaise aaun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offered quick grounding options suitable for a stressful office environment.
text: Is physical panic ko todne ke liye do aasan cheezein try kar sakte hain: ya toh jab boss ki aawaz aaye toh ek ghoont pani peekar saans hold karein, ya apni desk par koi pen rakhein jise thodi der mutthi mein daba kar dhyan bhatka sakein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pani peene wala idea thoda asaan lag raha hai. Aaj kal toh office ke cabin ki taraf jane ke naam se hi sharir har waqt kaanpta rehta hai. Ghabrahat se saansein bohut tez ho jati hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walked him through executing the water and breathing grounding technique step by step.
text: Toh aane wale kal ke liye ek chhota kadam uthate hain: jab bhi cabin ki taraf jana ho, apni seat se uthne se pehle pani ka ek bada ghoont lo... phir dreere se saans chhodte hue kadam aage badhao... bas itna hi koshish karni hai kal.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan
text: Theek hai, main dhyan se yeh karunga. Sirf ek ghoont pani aur dheere se saans nikalna. Par jab gaon se Papa ka phone aata hai aur sahukaar ka zikr hota hai, tab bhi yahi pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan dobara tezi se shuru ho jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored how triggers from home reignite the prolonged trauma response (Lens D).
text: Pichle kuch mahino se jab bhi us gaon aur karz ki charcha chhidti hai, wo purana beeti hui nakami ka darr wapas usi pal mein tumhe gher kar physically tod deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki mujhe lagta hai agar maine ab solution nahi nikala toh sab khatam ho jayega. Main ek failure ki tarah PSC se wapas aaya, ab family ko ye karz bhi nahi utarwa paya toh shayad mera zinda rehna bekar hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Handled the moderate risk flag with a safe restatement acknowledging his heavy burden and checking for safety (Lens E).
text: Zindagi ka yeh safar aur saari ummeedon ka bojh akele uthane ki wajah se tumhe apne bhavishya mein sab kuch bohut andhera aur khatam hota lag raha hai... Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan
text: Haan main theek hoon, bas flow mein thoda jyada bol gaya. Mera dhyan khud ko nuksan pahunchane par nahi hai, bas is lagatar pain se chhutkara chahta hoon. Main bas chahta hoon ye pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan theek ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassured him after the mild risk flag, validating the heaviness of his duty.
text: Yeh mehsoos karna us insaan ke liye bahut aam hai jisne apne kandhon par poore pariwar ko us khet ke sahukaar se bachane ki zimmedari le rakhi ho, aur us nirasha mein over-think kar lena bohut normal hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya aapki samajh ke liye. Sach kahun toh main us extreme raste par nahi jaunga, bas thak gaya tha. Apne is sharir ko wapas strong banana chahta hoon taaki aage focus kar saku.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Suggested simple bodily interventions to help manage the nervous system without adding duties.
text: Focus badhane aur sharir ko thoda aaram dene ke liye, kya hum office ke baad 10 minute kisi khuli jagah ya park mein chalne ki aadat dal sakte hain, ya phir raat ko sone se pehle room mein thodi stretching kar sakte hain?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan
text: Raat ko room mein stretching karna theek rahega. Park jane mein mujhe ajeeb lagta hai. Par kya thodi si stretching karne se mere pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan me sach much aaram aayega?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explained how physical movement communicates safety to a stressed nervous system.
text: Halki stretching se tumhare tanaav se bhari hui muscles ko ek signal milta hai ki ab aas paas koi direct khatra nahi hai, jisse dreere-dreere us danger mode mein shanti aati hai aur pet ka tanaav kam hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Achha, matalab dimag ko shant karne ka ek direct physical tareeqa bhi hai. Yeh toh main roz bed par jaane se pehle pakka kar sakta hoon. Apne control mein lag rahi hain cheezein ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected how he is balancing his duty with his body's needs (Lens B).
text: Apne parivar ki suraksha ko dhyan mein rakhne ke saath-saath, ab tumne is lambi daud ke liye khud ki body ko sambhalne ka ek practical farz bhi apna liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha, agar gaadi hi toot jayegi toh main karz ki manzil tak kaise pahunchunga? Isiliye ye physical sukoon aur rasta mere liye bohut zaroori hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asked how his outlook on the future feels now that he has a tool to manage his panic.
text: Is naye nazariye ke saath jab tum aage ke waqt ko dekhte ho, toh wo job ka darr aur panic ab kitna alag mehsoos hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Darr toh hai abhi bhi... aakhir sahukaar ka karz utarna ek lamba safar hai. Par ab lag raha hai ki main us darr ko haavi nahi hone dunga. Main choti choti stretching aur paani ki trick se handle kar lunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the shift from constant physical anticipation of fear to managing it over time (Lens D).
text: Aane wale waqt ki pareshani wahi hai, par pichle kuch ghanton ki us ghabrahat se nikalkar tumne aage ka safar thande dimaag se tay karne ki nayi taqat pa li hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur agar dobara panic attack jaisa laga aur sharir kaanpa, toh mujhe yaad rahega ki mere paas raste hain ruk kar theek hone ke. Bahut bahut shukriya mujhe yahan tak sunne ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided a final validation of his readiness to manage his somatic symptoms and duty going forward.
text: Is badlaav ko dekhna vakayi tasalli deta hai; itne bhari karz aur job pressure ke baad bhi apne sharir ki sunna aur usko waqt dena, tumhari ek nayi aur poori tarah surakshit shuruaat hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb si thandak aur sunn-pan chha gaya hai
text: Aaj meeting mein Boss ne meri capability par sawal uthaye, tabhi se mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb si thandak aur sunn-pan chha gaya hai. Gaon mein kisan credit card ka loan baki hai aur fasal na hone se remittance band hai, isi wajah se shaayad mujhe bhookh bilkul nahi lag rahi aur kamzori badhti ja rahi hai. Ye thakan itni hai ki kitabein uthane ki bhi himmat nahi bachi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the exact somatic phrase to validate the intense physical toll of his stress.
text: Sunkar mehsus ho raha hai ki aaj office ki baaton aur us karz ki tension ki wajah se 'aapke poore jism mein ek ajeeb si thandak aur sunn-pan chha gaya hai', jiske karan sari himmat toot rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb si thandak aur sunn-pan chha gaya hai
text: Haan, sach kahu toh Pune me aakar bauji ke KCC loan ka bojh akele uthaya nahi ja raha. Aur abhi mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb si thandak aur sunn-pan chha gaya hai is darr se ki agar boss ne nikal diya toh main kya karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the prolonged duration of holding this financial and work pressure alone in a new city.
text: Pichle kuch arse se aap lagataar is nayi city mein karz, gaon ka darr aur office ka dabaav akele jhelte hue bilkul nichud gaye hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul akele jhel raha hu. Gaon walo ko lagta hai bada afsar banega shehar me. Agar main fail ho gaya aur bina paise bheje wapas gaya toh sab bolenge ki kisi layak nahi tha. Ye soch kar hi saans atakne lagti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirroring the feared consequence of facing societal shame without asking a question.
text: Agar boss ne kaam se nikal diya, toh biradari mein banne wala tamasha aur taane aapko aur dara rahe hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bhookh bilkul nahi lag rahi aur kamzori badhti ja rahi hai
text: Taano ka darr hi toh andar se bhookh maar raha hai. Bhookh bilkul nahi lag rahi aur kamzori badhti ja rahi hai pichle kuch dino se. Subah uthne ka bhi mann nahi karta, bas bistar me pada rehta hu chupchap.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Exploring how he manages to continue functioning amidst the severe physical exhaustion and systemic debt.
text: Jab ek taraf bauji ke karz ka pahad hai aur dusri taraf jism mein aisi kamzori aur bhookh na lagne ki dikkat badh rahi hai, toh is sabke beech aap office aur padhai ke liye khud ko kaise khada kar paate hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kahan khada kar pata hu ab. Bas mechanically jata hu office aur wapas aata hu. Mere andar koi takat nahi bachi hai. Ek taraf KCC ki EMI aur dusri taraf meri aukaat pe sawal. Lagta hai sach me main is life me fail ho chuka hu.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the deep exhaustion that arises from balancing familial debt and workplace invalidation.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki KCC ka bojh, gaon ki umeed aur ab boss ki in baaton ne milkar aapke andar ek bohot gahri exhaustion aur fail hone ka darr paida kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb si thandak aur sunn-pan chha gaya hai
text: Ekdum sahi baat. Failure ka darr hi hai jisne freeze kar rakha hai mujhe. Mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb si thandak aur sunn-pan chha gaya hai wapas. Gaon me log aas lagaye baithe hain remittance ki, aur main yahan exam ki kitabein tak nahi khol paa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing his physical reaction as a valid response to the immense structural pressure of migrant debt and duties.
text: Akele is shehar mein gaon ki sari zimmedari uthana aur KCC ke karz ke darr ke saath jeena, kisi ki bhi bhookh aur energy khatam kar sakta hai, aur yeh ghabrahat aapki kisi kamzori ki nishani bilkul nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kamzori nahi toh aur kya hai bhai? Boss ne do minute me prove kar diya ki main incapable hu. Tabhi se body me koi harkat nahi feel ho rahi. Bas andar ek bhari khali-pan lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using brief self-disclosure to systemic pattern of migrant men masking their distress and somatizing debt pressures.
text: Naye shehar mein kaam karne wale ladkon mein akele karz aur ghar walon ki umeedon ke dabaav se is tarah body ka sunn pad jana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sab pe apne mardon wali image bachane ka bojh hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha, yahan sab log bas hero ban ke dikhate hain bahar se. Par main andar se poori tarah thak chuka hu. Ab mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha ki kal office kaise jaunga aur is sunn-pan se theek kaise hounga. Kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering simple, grounded actions that fit his migrant context and don't require heavy emotional labor.
text: Kal office jane se pehle hum do aasan cheezein try kar sakte hain. Ya toh aap subah uthkar bas do minute ke liye apne sasoon par dhyaan dekar body ki is thandak ko dekhein, ya gaon ki koi aisi photo apne phone par dekhein jo aapko himmat de.

speaker: Seeker
text: Gaon ki baat sochkar abhi aur zyada darr lagta hai. Saans pe dhyan dena theek rahega shayad. Par ye main khud se akele kaise karunga itni thakan aur sunn-pan me jab dimaag hi theek nahi hai?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guiding him through the breathing exercise gently step by step.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki aaram se bed par ya kursi par thik se baith jao… phir dreere dreere apni saans ko seene mein aate hue mehsoos karo aur jane do… bas itna hi aaj ke liye, apna dhyaan sirf hawa ke andar aane aur jane par rakho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kar raha hu... Aapke batane par abhi thoda try kiya. Jo saans lagatar atak rahi thi chati me subah se, wo abhi thodi si normal lag rahi hai khinchne me. Par bhookh aur weakness abhi bhi wahin hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing his ongoing lack of appetite and weakness as a structural, systemic response rather than personal failure.
text: Jab dimaag lagataar karz aur boss ki umeedon ke dabaav se takrata hai, toh jism ka is tarah thak jana aur bhookh mit jana structural pressure ka ek bilkul normal reaction hai, yeh body ka tareeka hai aapko thoda theharne ka signal dene ka.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb si thandak aur sunn-pan chha gaya hai
text: Theharne ka signal... shayad aap thik keh rahe hain. Mera jism hi bol raha hai ki thoda ruk jao. Par wahi darr... mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb si thandak aur sunn-pan chha gaya hai ki kahin main sach me thehar gaya toh gaon me bauji ka kya hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting his duty-bound conflict where taking a pause feels impossible due to family obligations.
text: Is poore dabaav ko apne farz ke taur par uthate hue, aap apne aapko ek aisi halat mein pa rahe hain jahan aaram karna zaroori bhi lagta hai aur naukri chhutne ke darr se bilkul namumkin bhi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Namumkin hi lagta tha, par abhi thoda dimaag chal raha hai ki agar meri health hi nahi bachi toh us naukri aur padhai ka koi fayda nahi. Aaj kitabein toh bilkul nahi chuhunga main, thoda aaram karunga bina guilty feel kiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating his decision to rest as a sign of strength and awareness.
text: Aaj kitabein na uthakar apne thake hue jism ko aaram dene ka faisla dikhata hai ki aapne apne farz ke saath-saath apni body ki pukaar ko bhi thik se sun liya hai, aur yeh ek bohot bada aur samajhdari wala kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sunna hi padega mujhe. Warna yahan Pune me room par koi aakar paani bhi nahi dega agar mai bimar pad gaya toh. Aur rahi baat boss ki, uski chillam-chilli ko mai kal se utna seriously nahi lunga, uska kaam hai chilana.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the shift in how he anticipates handling the workplace stress moving forward.
text: Aapne us tension aur negativity se darr kar chote padne ki bajay, ab boss ki un baaton ko ek hadd tak khud se door rakhne ka raasta tay kar liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur ab lag raha hai ki thoda boj kam hua hai dil par se. Par wo kisan credit card ki kist toh deni hi padegi kaise bhi. Main kal subah uth ke planning kar lunga thande dimag se. Abhi ghabrahat thodi kam hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing pausing as a strategic tool to manage debt planning rather than an avoidance tactic.
text: In aarthik pareshaniyon aur karz ke bojh ko raat bhar panic mein sochne se aage ke raste band nazar aate hain, par is tarah ek lamba thehraav lene se dimaag ko practical solutions nikalne ki jagah mil jaati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul theek keh rahe ho aap ki dimaag ko space chaiye tha. Subah se main har waqt sirf remittance, boss aur failure ke loop me fasa tha. Ab pata nahi kaise, par pet me thodi thodi bhookh feel hone lagi hai achanak.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the restoration of his mind-body connection now that the acute panic has lifted.
text: Mujhe yeh dekh kar kafi tasalli ho rahi hai ki thodi der pehle wale us jamawat aur darr ki jagah, ab aapko apne hi jism aur mind ke beech ek naya sukoon aur connection wapas milta dikh raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi baat hai, aaj mujhe sach me halka feel hua. Main pune me do saal se hu par pehli baar kisi ke samne apna asli darr bata paya. Gaon walo aur dosto se toh hamesha sirf paise aur naukri ki hi baatein hoti hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the power of being heard securely outside the transactional demands of his daily life.
text: Yeh samajh aana ki kis jagah aapko bina kisi darr ya mardon wali judgement ke suna ja raha hai, apne aap mein ek bohot badi taqat hai, is mushkil waqt mein aap akele bilkul nahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Akele nahi hone ka ehsaas hi kafi badi takat de raha hai abhi toh. Meri wo thandak aur sunn-pan jo subah se lagatar badh rahi thi, wo lagbhag completely utar gayi hai ab meri body se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the physical release of the somatic shade.
text: Aapke jism ne us ghabrahat ki pakad bilkul chhod di hai, aur wo jo 'thandak aur sunn-pan chha gaya' tha, usne aakhirkaar ek naye halkepan aur aaram ko jagah de di hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Ab main jaa kar apne liye thodi dal aur chawal bana leta hu. Din bhar ki bhookh ab sach me zor se jaag chuki hai, kuch toh pet me dalna hi padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting his reclaiming of basic self-care after prolonged suppression.
text: Is pal mein apne jism ki zarurat ko samajh kar, itne lambe waqt ke us sunn-pan ke baad wapas apne liye khana pakane ki himmat dikhana sach mein ek bohot bada badlaav hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ek achha badlaav hi kahunga isko main aaj ke din me. Kal naye sirre se boss se aur us loan ki planning se deal karunga akele hi sahi, par thande dimag se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the feared consequence into a manageable upcoming challenge.
text: Aane wale kal ke us KCC EMI aur boss ke gusse ko aapne ab apni raah rokne wali kisi badi khaufnak deewar banne se poori tarah mana kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bane hi nahi dunga diwaar use. Chaliye, ab main khana khata hu aur so jata hu. Aapse baat karke mujhe sach me aaj thehraav mil gaya. Thank you so much dost.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Warmly closing the session with culturally grounded encouragement and validation of his resilience.
text: Aapne itni bhari jimmedariyon aur dabaav ke beech aakhirkar khud ke thehraav ko jeet liya, aur yeh aapke safar ki ek bohot badi mazbooti hai. Apna aur apne daal-chawal ka aise hi ache se dhyan rakhiyega, aapko aage ke liye dher saari shubhkamnayein.

text: Haan, sir itna bhari hai ki book kholte hi aankhon mein jalan badh jaati hai. Gaon mein Papa ki saari umar ki mehnat doob gayi, unka chit fund ka loss mere dimaag mein chalta rehta hai. Samajh nahi aata job ki tension jhelun, UPSC ka syllabus dekhun, ya karze ka bojh.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the conflict between his duty as a son, a working professional, and a student.
text: Pariwaar ke us aarthik nuksaan aur aage ki zimmedari ke beech, aapko job ka dabaav aur padhai dono ko ek hi waqt par nibhana pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere kaano mein seetiyaan baj rahi hain aur sir bhari lag raha hai
text: Nibhana toh padega kyunki aur koi raasta nahi hai. Par mere kaano mein seetiyaan baj rahi hain aur sir bhari lag raha hai abhi bhi. Jab boss ne sabke saamne daanta, us insult ke baad se mujhe bahut sharam aati hai wapas apni hi team ke logon ko face karne mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational strain and shame he feels towards facing his colleagues after the incident.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the prolonged duration of his UPSC preparation and how the current lack of sleep is impacting it.
text: Itne saalon se exam ke liye jo aapki kadi mehnat chal rahi thi, us lambe safar par is nayi tension aur neend na aane ka seedha asar pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Asar itna hai ki mera dimaag kaam nahi karta aaj kal. Agar main UPSC clear nahi kar paya toh Papa ka dooba hua paisa kaise launga? Main unke aage kya muh dikhaunga?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly reflecting the feared consequence due to the stigma cue, keeping it brief and ending in a pause.
text: Aapko lagta hai ki exam nahi nikla toh aap pariwaar ki umeedon par khare nahi utar payenge...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere kaano mein seetiyaan baj rahi hain aur sir bhari lag raha hai
text: Wahi toh meri life ka sabse bada failure hoga. Mere kaano mein seetiyaan baj rahi hain aur sir bhari lag raha hai just us bare mein soch kar. Ek taraf job ki humiliation, dusri taraf gaon ka karza, aur yahan itna bada syllabus... aisa lagta hai main kahin ka nahi raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the exhaustion and helplessness of being caught in multiple failing duty frames.
text: Lagta hai akele hi ghar ka aarthik bojh aur office ki tension dono ko manage karte hue, aap ek aisi gehri thakan aur helplessness mehsoos kar rahe hain, jise ab body ne pain ke roop mein dikhana shuru kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Thakan body se zyada dimaag mein hai. Jab boss ne chillaya, toh mujhe laga meri saari izzat khatam ho gayi. Aur Papa ki taraf dekhta hoon toh guilt hota hai ki as a son main kuch solve nahi kar paa raha abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the structural nature of his distress and separating his worth from the corporate incident and the chit fund scam.
text: Jab pariwaar ke liye ek solid future banane ki itni badi jimmedari ho, toh workplace par kisi authority figure dwara aise public mein treat kiye jaane par shame aur exhaustion aana poori tarah se swabhavik hai; corporate ka yeh bura experience aapki value ya mehnat ko kam nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad aap theek keh rahe hain, par woh guilt jaata nahi. Papa ka paisa scam mein gaya aur main wahan unke paas bhi nahi hoon. Meri aankhon mein jalan itni badh gayi hai screen dekh dekh kar, UPSC ki PDFs padhi hi nahi jaati aaj kal.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the specific guilt of dual-burden UPSC aspirants using systemic framing.
text: UPSC aspirants jo aarthik support ke liye job bhi karte hain, unmein yeh guilt aur physical thakan bahut common hai — sirf aap akele is se nahi guzar rahe hain, lekin log bolte nahi kyunki family ko aage badhane ka dabaav sab kuch daba deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein, koi nahi samajhta is dohre bojh ko, sabko lagta hai office jaa raha hai toh sab theek hi hoga. Ab mujhe batao main aage kya karoon? Job aur padhai ek sath manage nahi ho rahi aur aankhein dard kar rahi hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering practical, low-effort options that fit within his existing routine without demanding he drop duties.
text: Apne body ke is bhari-pan ko thoda control mein laane ke liye hum do practical cheezein soch sakte hain. Ya toh aap daily padhai ke waqt ko chhote aur manageable 30-minute blocks mein baant sakte hain, ya phir aankhon ki jalan ke liye office aur padhai ke dauran har ek ghante mein 5 minute screen se completely door rehne ki aadat bana sakte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Screen se door rehna shayad abhi better rahega. Aankhon ko waise hi bahut strain ho raha hai aur usse sir aur bhari ho jata hai. Par main start kaise karoon, office ka system hi aisa hai ki screen se nazar nahi hathti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the screen-break suggestion into a highly actionable micro-step.
text: Pehle apne phone par har ek ghante baad ka recurring alarm set kijiye... phir jab woh baje toh sirf 5 minute ke liye apni aankhein band karke ya screen se hatkar door dekhiye... bas itna hi aaj ke liye try karna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, main laptop aur phone dono pe timer laga lunga. Lekin office mein aankh band karunga toh phir se boss ki us din ki insult aur sabke saamne sunayi baatein dimaag mein ghoomne lagti hain. Woh sharam nahi jaati.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the boss's behavior as a structural issue in corporate power dynamics, not a personal failing of the Seeker.
text: Corporate duniya ke is pressure culture mein, aksar power dynamics aur toxic hierarchy ki wajah se authority figures aise behave karte hain; is tarah ki humiliation sirf ek power play hoti hai, aur iska aapki capability ya aapke rural background se koi direct relation nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye baat ekdum sahi boli aapne. Mera focus apne aur Papa ke future par hona chahiye, na ki kisi rude boss ki baaton par. Par kabhi kabhi rural area se aane ka ek internal complex ho jata hai ki shayad main hi weak hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the deeper insecurity regarding his background and its perceived impact on workplace respect.
text: Aapke man mein kahin na kahin yeh darr baitha hai ki gaon se aane ke kaaran ya us complex ki wajah se, log aapko kamzor samjhenge ya office mein easily nicha dikha payenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul. Tabhi toh UPSC clear karna itna zaruri hai mere liye. Chit fund ka bada loss ussi respect aur job se recover hoga gaon mein. Mujhe bas apne routine ko phir se theek karna hi hoga aaj se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring his duty-based resolve to rebuild his family's respect and finances through his routine.
text: Pariwaar ki woh khoi hui respect wapas laane aur gaon mein aarthik sthiti theek karne ke is bade duty ko poora karne ke liye, aap puri mehnat se apne padhai ke routine par wapas dhyan lagana chahte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Aaj se hi thoda syllabus phir se review karunga. Agar screen dekh kar aankhon mein dard hua, toh main PDF chhod kar audio lectures sun lunga bed par let kar, taaki padhai na ruke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the physical accommodation he has made to bypass the somatic symptom.
text: Toh ab agar aapka sir bhari lage ya screen dekh kar aankhon mein jalan ho, tab bhi aapne audio sunne ka ek smart aur practical backup plan khud taiyaar kar liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, audio sunne se aasaani hogi kaafi. Aur shayad Papa se bhi aaj shaam ko normally thodi der baat kar lun. Unko bol dunga ki tension na lein, main hoon aur hum dheere dheere sab manage kar lenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Checking his internal emotional state after formulating this supportive plan.
text: Jab aap apne Papa se is tarah unhe samjha kar aur ek mazboot bharosa dikha kar baat karne ka plan sochte hain, toh ab aapko andar se kaisa lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab mujhe finally thoda calm lag raha hai. Pichle kuch dinon se jo dimaag mein stress ka storm chal रहा tha, wo definitely thoda shant hua hai. Mujhe sirf apna aage ka chhota step dekhna hai, poora pahaad nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating his resilience and ability to pivot focus towards constructive steps.
text: Itne aarthik dabaav aur personal struggle ko jhelne ke baad bhi, apna focus wapas future aur apne Papa ko tasalli dene par laana, aapki asli lagan aur ek zimmedar bete ki taqat ko dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere kaano mein seetiyaan baj rahi hain
text: Aapne baaton baaton mein kaafi light feel kara diya. Mere kaano mein seetiyaan baj rahi hain abhi bhi halka sa, par woh jhel lunga, aur dimag ka bhari-pan zaroor kam hua hai aapse baat karke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relief he found in sharing the burden that had been isolating him.
text: Is conversation ke zariye aapko apne andar ke us isolation aur sharam ke bojh ko halka karne ka ek zariya mila, jise aap ab tak poori tarah akele hi utha rahe the.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi mein. Akele sab handle karna possible nahi hota, dimaag short circuit kar jata hai. Main kal se timer wala idea office mein zaroor strictly try karunga. Us se difference aana chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring his forward-looking timeframe regarding the new strategy.
text: Aage aane wale kal se, aap us 5-minute timer ke chhote step ko apna kar apne din bhar ke thakne wale routine ko thoda control aur asaan banane ki nayi umeed kar rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, absolutely. Ek baar mera schedule track pe aaye aur body saath de, toh baaki sab dhire dhire fall in place karega. Thank you for listening to my rants without any judgement.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the release of his fear of judgement, allowing him to step confidently into his plan.
text: Bina kisi ke taanon ya office ki humiliation ke darr ke apni saari uljhan bahar nikal kar, aap ab wapas confidently apne future steps lena shuru kar rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Ek nayi energy lag rahi hai. Sham ko walk par bhi jaunga thodi der relax karne. Is baar UPSC bhi theek se denge aur Papa ka debt bhi ek din clear karenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Concluding by mirroring his overarching duty framework as a source of strength.
text: Apne aur apni family ke aane wale kal ko surakshit karne ki jo gahri shiddat aur duty ki bhaavna aap mein hai, wahi ab aapko exam aur is financial situation dono se mazbooti se aage le jayegi.
